mapper.select:
SELECT n.notice_no, n.title, n.content, n.notice_cd, c.code_nm AS notice_type_nm, n.pin_yn, n.view_cnt, n.created_at, n.created_by FROM notice n LEFT JOIN com_code c ON c.grp_cd = 'NOTICE_TYPE_CD' AND c.code = n.notice_cd WHERE n.use_yn = 'Y'
AND n.notice_cd = #{searchType}
AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY n.pin_yn DESC, n.notice_no DESC

SELECT n.notice_no, n.title, n.content, n.notice_cd, c.code_nm AS notice_type_nm, n.pin_yn, n.view_cnt, n.created_at, n.created_by FROM notice n LEFT JOIN com_code c ON c.grp_cd = 'NOTICE_TYPE_CD' AND c.code = n.notice_cd WHERE n.notice_no = #{noticeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, notice_cd, pin_yn, use_yn, created_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{noticeCd}, #{pinYn}, 'Y', #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, notice_cd = #{noticeCd}, pin_yn = #{pinYn}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE notice_no = #{noticeNo}
UPDATE notice SET use_yn = 'N', updated_at = NOW() WHERE notice_no = #{noticeNo}
